---
title: "2026-07-15"
---

## Research framing frozen

The manuscript's working main line is **spatiotemporal heterogeneity in reconstructed lake surface water temperature change worldwide**. GLAST is a corrected/reconstructed LSWT product built from station-temperature information and ERA5-Land-driven FLAKE simulations; it is not direct in-situ lake-temperature observation. In this project, `raw` means un-smoothed GLAST product values.

> 主线冻结为“全球湖泊重建 LSWT 变化的时空异质性”。GLAST 不是直接站点实测；raw 指未经过本项目平滑的产品值。

The primary descriptive chain is:

```text
raw annual reconstructed LSWT
  → long-term Theil--Sen warming
  → trailing-10-year local Theil--Sen warming speed
  → Sen trend of valid local-speed sequence (warming-speed change)
```

The final quantity is an operational long-term change in local warming speed, not resolved instantaneous physical acceleration.

> 10 年局部速度序列的长期 Sen 趋势称“增温速度变化”，不称可精确恢复的瞬时物理加速度。

## PCA, clustering, and ice module

PCA uses annualised `nt=99` STL trend baseline anomalies. It defines continuous low-frequency trajectory geometry. PC1 is a stable global mode under random-half-sample and leave-continent-out checks; PC2--PC5 are region/sample-composition-sensitive secondary descriptive modes.

Clustering is restored only as a descriptive typology in PCA-score space: PCA supplies continuous geometry, clustering supplies representative profiles. Main display is K=5 / PC1--PC5; K=4--8 and PC1--PC9 are sensitivity branches. Clusters are not intrinsic natural lake categories.

> PCA 定义连续轨迹空间；clustering 只压缩为代表性 typology。K=5/PC1–PC5 主展示，其他设置作敏感性；不把 cluster 当作自然类别。

Cooling is a separate, optional ice module. It compares full- and late-period cooling, seasonal raw trends, and baseline ice-duration strata. A summer-associated cooling subset can motivate future glacier-catchment work, but glacier meltwater is not attributed without connectivity, discharge, and inflow evidence.

> cooling 独立为可选冰模块。冰川融水仅是后续待检验假说。

## Scope boundary

No new primary time-series algorithm, global partitioning method, STARS branch, causal attribution model, or teleconnection-centred narrative will be added to this manuscript. ERA5 is a constrained association input only, with explicit acknowledgement that ERA5-Land already participates in the GLAST construction chain.

> 主方法冻结；ERA5 只做受限关联，且必须说明其与 GLAST 产品构建链的依赖。
